name: sec-review-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace distributing sec-review: a cybersecurity audit plugin with a top-tier domain-expert subagent and live-CVE-enriched review skill for web services and servers.

plugins.name: sec-review
plugins.description: Four-agent cybersecurity review pipeline (sec-expert + finding-triager + cve-enricher + report-writer, model-pinned for cost efficiency). Analyzes a project against top-tier security expertise (DB, framework, webserver, proxy, frontend, auth, TLS, container, secrets, supply-chain) and live CVE feeds (NVD, OSV, GHSA). Produces a prioritized markdown report with cited, reliable fixes.
